title: Peppermint Crusted Steak
description: A refreshing twist on a classic steak dish, featuring a peppermint crust and a hint of spice.

ingredients.name: Steak
ingredients.notes: Ribeye or strip loin work well

ingredients.name: Spice
ingredients.notes: such as black pepper or paprika

instructions: Season the steak with the crushed peppermint and ground spice.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and sear the steak for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook to desired doneness.
Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
